properties.name: app.upload.dir
properties.description: Base directory for ticket attachment uploads.

properties.name: app.auth.github.client-id
properties.description: GitHub OAuth client ID for authentication.

properties.name: app.auth.github.client-secret
properties.description: GitHub OAuth client secret for authentication.

properties.name: app.auth.github.redirect-uri
properties.description: GitHub OAuth redirect URI after authentication.

properties.name: app.auth.jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64 encoded secret key for JWT token signing.

properties.name: app.auth.jwt.access-token-minutes
properties.description: JWT access token expiration time in minutes.

properties.name: app.auth.jwt.refresh-token-days
properties.description: JWT refresh token expiration time in days.
